titleStmt.title: SII 28.196: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 196. (A.R. No. 351 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, south gōpuram, left of entrance.

Records an order of Chēdīyarāyaṉ addressed to the kaṇ-kāṇi-karaṇattār and tirukkai-oṭṭi-paṇḍārattār of the temple of Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyār in respect of two gardens, one set up by Araiyaṉ Maṉṟuḷāḍum-permāḷ alias Villavadarayar, the kiḻāṉ of Chiṟṟāṟkāḍu in Āṟkāṭṭu-kkūṟṟam in Pāñḍi ••• ti •• vaḷanāḍu and the other named Chēḍiyarāyāṉ, set up Chellappiḷḷaiyār alias Chēdiyarāyāṉ on land of the extent 4500 kuḻi (boundaries specified) and in respect of 8 vēli, 7 mā, 3(1/2) kāṇi in several plots granted as tiru-nandavaṉa-ppuṟam granted for meeting the expenses on the wages (koṟṟu) and clothes (puḍavai) of 18 persons (tiruttoṇḍar), 16 of whom were meant to tend the two gardens and the remaining two were attached to the water distribution kiosk (taṇṇīr-pandal) that was attached to the gardens. The sale deeds pertaining to the lands involved were ordered to be deposited in the tirukkai-oṭṭi-paṇḍāram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . [śrī]maṟkirttikkumel komāṟapaṉma
[rāṉa tribhuva] ṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevarkku yā
yāṇṭu nālāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟu Irupattu muṉṟiṉāl
cetiyarāyaṉ Olai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamu
ṭaiyār koyil kaṇkāṇikaraṇattārum tirukkaio
ṭṭi paṇṭārattārum kaṇṭu perumpaṟṟappuliyūrppi
ṭākai kaṭavācceriyāṉa tillaināyakanallūril pā
ṇṭi ni vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟkāṭṭukkūṟṟattu ciṟṟā
ṟkāṭu kiḻāṉ Araiyaṉ maṉṟuḷāṭum perumāḷ Āṉa
villavatarayar ceyvitta tiruṉantavaṉattukkum
namperāl ceyta ciṟṟāṟkāṭu kiḻārāṉa
cellappiḷḷaiyārāṉa cetiyarāyaṉ ce
yvitta tiruṉantavaṉattukkum Ellai virarāce
ntaracoḻaṉ tiruvitikku kiḻakkum vaṭakkum kiḻai
pperuvaḻikku meṟkum tillaiṉāyakaṉ vāykkā
lukku teṟkkum naṭu Uṭppaṭṭa tiruṉantavaṉa Iraṇṭi
ṉāl kuḻi naālāyirattu Aiññūṟum tiruppū maṇṭapattu
kku mutalāka pala ti
tirumaṭaippaḷḷi paṇṭārattukkum tirukkākkiḷḷi
ppaṇṭārattukkum mutalāka teṅku palā Uḷḷiṭṭa
maraṅkaḷ kkic ceyyumpaṭi ciṟṟārkkāṭu kiḻāṉ
maṉṟuḷāṭum perumāḷ tirunantavaṉattukkum
cetiyarāyaṉ tirunantavaṉattukkum mutal koṇṭa
tiruttoṇṭarkaḷ per patiṉāṟum Ittirunantava
ṉattuṭaṉ kūṭṭiṉa taṇṇir pantalukku per
Iraṇṭum Ākap per patiṉeṭṭukkum jīvaṉat
tukkum puṭavai mutalukkum kāṇi Āḷā kāṇi
yil koṇṭu viṭṭa kaṭavāycceriyāṉa
tillaināyakanallūril taṭi Aiñciṉāl nilam
Oṉṟe kāle mukkāṇi Araik kāṇiyum
laippāṭiyāṉa Irācakecarinallūril
taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl nilam Eṭṭu māvum caṇ
ṭeśvaranallūr Āṉa Irācakecarinallūril
taṭi palaviṉāl nilam muṉṟe mukkālum naṭu
viṟkaraiyāṉa jaṉanāta nallūril Uḷḷo
ṭaiyeṉṟu peruṭaiya taṭi palaviṉāl
nilam muveliyum Āka nilam Eṭṭe Eḻu
mā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Ittiruttoṇṭar
per patiṉeṭṭukku koṟṟukkum puṭavai mutalu
kkum Uṭalāka Iṉṉāḷ mutal tirunantavaṉapuṟam
mutalkoṇṭu Innilaṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭa
pramāṇaṅkaḷum tirukkaioṭṭip paṇṭārat
vum Ittirunantavaṉappuṟam candrādityava
llak kallilum cempilum veṭ
ḷḷakkaṭavatākavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi
paṇṇuvate § Ivai cetiarāyaṉ E
Digital edition of SII 28.196 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
